visual: Empty stance with weight on the rear leg, forward hand extends palm-up at chest height while the rear hand withdraws to the hip, as if patting a horse's neck.
motion_description: From a forward stance with both arms extended, the palms rotate to face upward in a slow, continuous flow. The practitioner draws the rear foot in to bear the full body weight, prompting a slight rotation of the torso. As the front foot steps lightly forward into an empty stance, the rear arm sweeps forward to extend at chest height while the initially forward hand withdraws to rest at the hip.
